title: Opening for Medical Officer at Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services:
Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care Holdings Services!
